Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.Builder
Enclosing class:
DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource
public static final class DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.Builder extends Object
Builder for DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.

    • flareHeader

      public DynamicBlowdownFlareStudyDataSource.Builder flareHeader(double diameterM, double pressureBara, double temperatureK, double molarMassKgPerMol, double gamma)
      Sets flare header basis.
      Parameters:
      diameterM - header internal diameter in m
      pressureBara - header pressure in bara
      temperatureK - header temperature in K
      molarMassKgPerMol - header molar mass in kg/mol
      gamma - isentropic exponent
      Returns:
      this builder

      Parameters:
      maxAllowableHeaderMach - Mach limit
      Returns:
      this builder

      Parameters:
      tipDiameterM - flare tip diameter in m
      flameHeightM - effective flame height in m
      radiantFraction - radiant fraction
      Returns:
      this builder

      this builder
